class.name: ZipOutputStream
class.description: This class implements an output stream filter for writing files in the ZIP file format. Includes support for both compressed and uncompressed entries.

constructors.name: ZipOutputStream
constructors.description: Creates a new ZIP output stream. The UTF-8 charset is used to encode the entry names and comments.

constructors.name: ZipOutputStream
constructors.description: Creates a new ZIP output stream.

parameters.name: charset
parameters.description: the charset to be used to encode the entry names and comments

throws.description: if the length of the specified ZIP file comment is greater than 0xFFFF bytes

methods.name: setMethod
methods.description: Sets the default compression method for subsequent entries. This default will be used whenever the compression method is not specified for an individual ZIP file entry, and is initially set to DEFLATED.

throws.description: if the specified compression method is invalid

methods.name: setLevel
methods.description: Sets the compression level for subsequent entries which are DEFLATED. The default setting is DEFAULT_COMPRESSION.

throws.description: if the compression level is invalid

methods.name: putNextEntry
methods.signature: public void putNextEntry(ZipEntry e) throws IOException
methods.description: Begins writing a new ZIP file entry and positions the stream to the start of the entry data. Closes the current entry if still active. The default compression method will be used if no compression method was specified for the entry. When writing a compressed (DEFLATED) entry, and the compressed size has not been explicitly set with the ZipEntry.setCompressedSize(long) method, then the compressed size will be set to the actual compressed size after deflation. The current time will be used if the entry has no set modification time.

parameters.name: e
parameters.description: the ZIP entry to be written

throws.description: if a ZIP format error has occurred
if an I/O error has occurred

methods.name: closeEntry
methods.description: Closes the current ZIP entry and positions the stream for writing the next entry.

throws.description: if a ZIP format error has occurred
if an I/O error has occurred

methods.name: write
methods.signature: public void write(byte[] b, int off, int len) throws IOException
methods.description: Writes an array of bytes to the current ZIP entry data. This method will block until all the bytes are written.

parameters.name: off
parameters.description: the start offset in the data

parameters.name: len
parameters.description: the number of bytes that are written

throws.description: if a ZIP file error has occurred
if an I/O error has occurred

methods.name: finish
methods.description: Finishes writing the contents of the ZIP output stream without closing the underlying stream. Use this method when applying multiple filters in succession to the same output stream.

throws.description: if a ZIP file error has occurred
if an I/O exception has occurred

methods.name: close
methods.description: Closes the ZIP output stream as well as the stream being filtered.

throws.description: if a ZIP file error has occurred
if an I/O error has occurred
